title: Managing Relationships with ORMs Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on how ORMs and ODMs manage database relationships.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using an ORM/ODM to manage relationships?
options: To provide a high-level, object-oriented API for complex database connections
To delete records automatically with no configuration

questions.question: Which loading strategy retrieves associated records along with the main object in a single operation?
In a Mongoose schema, which property is used to link a field to a document from another collection?
What does a Sequelize 'belongsToMany' association automatically require?
options: A primary key on the parent table

questions.question: Which strategy allows associated data to be retrieved only when it's explicitly called for in the application logic?
